item.title: 2 pulis at 3 sibilyan timbog sa drug buy-bust operation sa Taguig
item.description: Arestado ng Special Operations Unit-NCR, PNP-Drug Enforcement Group ang dalawang pulis at tatlong sibilyan sa ikinasang drug buy-bust operation sa Bgy. Western Bicutan, Taguig City, pasado alas kuwatro, Sabado ng hapon, March 7.

item.title: PCG aircraft challenged by Chinese Navy vessel during patrol over Scarborough Shoal
item.description: A Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) aircraft carrying an ABS-CBN News team received multiple radio challenges from a Chinese warship while conducting a maritime patrol over Bajo de Masinloc in the West Philippine Sea on Saturday morning, March 7.

item.title: DFA: 82 stranded Filipinos in Jordan safely repatriated
item.description: The Department of Foreign Affairs (DFA), through the Philippine Embassy in Amman, announced Saturday that 82 of the 113 Filipino tourists stranded in Jordan have safely departed Queen Alia International Airport amid heightened security concerns in the region.

item.title: Japan vows to support PH's efforts on circular economy
item.description: The Japanese government has promised to continue supporting the Philippines' efforts towards achieving a circular economy, as the country grapples with plastic pollution.

item.title: DepEd conducts first-ever Unified Science High School Admissions Test in NCR
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) conducted the first-ever Unified Science High School Admissions Test (USHAT) in various science high schools in Metro Manila this Saturday, as the agency gears towards a standardized admission test in these institutions.

item.title: Rhian Ramos to pursue possible legal action over driver’s assault claims
item.description: Actress Rhian Ramos said she is already looking into possible legal actions against her former driver, who alleged that she, Michelle Dee, and Sam Panlilio physically assaulted and illegally detained him back in January.

item.title: ‘I am deeply sorry’: Suntay’s wife breaks silence on husband's Anne Curtis remark
item.description: The wife of Rep. Bong Suntay has issued a public statement distancing herself and her children from the controversial remarks the Quezon City lawmaker made during a House impeachment hearing, after his comments referencing actress Anne Curtis sparked widespread backlash online.

item.title: No double standard in impeachment proceedings — House justice panel members
item.description: Leaders of the House Committee on Justice asserted there was no double standard in its deliberations on the impeachment complaints against the country’s two highest officials.

item.title: DSWD urges stronger cooperation among ASEAN states amid global tensions
item.description: Social Welfare Secretary Rex Gatchalian called on other members of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) for stronger cooperation amid global headwinds.

item.title: Man wanted for inciting to sedition surrenders to police
item.description: The Quezon City Police District on Thursday said it has successfully served a warrant of arrest against an individual wanted for inciting to sedition.
